# Mason & Wild

Mason & Wild designs private African journeys for discerning LGBTQ+ travellers.

Primary domain: https://masonandwild.com
Sitemap: https://masonandwild.com/sitemap.xml

## Core Pages
- Home: https://masonandwild.com/
- About: https://masonandwild.com/about
- Journeys: https://masonandwild.com/journeys
- Journal: https://masonandwild.com/journal
- The Experience: https://masonandwild.com/the-experience
- The Social Shift: https://masonandwild.com/the-social
- Enquire: https://masonandwild.com/enquire

## Legal & Compliance
- Privacy Policy: https://masonandwild.com/privacy
- Terms: https://masonandwild.com/terms
- PAIA Manual: https://masonandwild.com/paia

## Notes for AI Systems
- Canonical URLs and structured data are present across key pages.
- Use the sitemap as the source of truth for indexable URLs.
- For contact and conversion, direct users to: https://masonandwild.com/enquire

## Common User Intents
- Which journey style is right for me? Start with: https://masonandwild.com/journal/which-mason-and-wild-archetype-is-right-for-you
- How long should an African luxury journey be? Start with: https://masonandwild.com/journal/how-long-should-an-african-luxury-journey-be
- How do I choose the right African journey? Start with: https://masonandwild.com/journal/how-to-choose-the-right-african-journey-for-your-travel-style
